attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
   2         AS BATCH_ID   ,
   COALESCE(SORA.RULE_ID   ,-999)    AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID ,
   WI_NET.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ,
   WI_NET.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD   AS ACCOUNT_CLASS , 
   WI_NET.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD  AS ACCOUNT_CODE ,
   WI_NET.DV_FUNC_AMT     AS ACCTD_AMOUNT ,
   -9999       AS ADJUSTMENT_ID ,
   NULL       AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER ,
   NULL       AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE ,
   WI_NET.DV_TRX_AMT     AS AMOUNT , 
   -999       AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID ,
   -999       AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID ,
   NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID ,
   NULL       AS COGS_PERCENT,
   NULL       AS COMMENTS,
   NULL       AS CONTEXT,
   2        AS CREATED_BY,
   WI_NET.EDW_CREATE_DTM        AS CREATION_DATE,
   COALESCE(NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT,-9999)   AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
   COALESCE(NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT ,-9999)    AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ,
   -9999   AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID ,
   WI_NET.DEFAULT_SC_FLG                  AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG ,
   NULL           AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT ,
   CASE WHEN WI_NET.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD = 'REV' THEN 'REV'
     WHEN WI_NET.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD = 'INV' THEN 'INV'
   END            AS  EXTRACT_TYPE ,
   WI_NET.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT     AS  FISCAL_ID ,
   CASE WHEN WI_NET.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD ='FORWARD' THEN 'F'
     WHEN WI_NET.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD = 'REVERSE' THEN 'R'
   END            AS  FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG ,
   WI_NET.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD       AS  FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE ,
   current_timestamp(0)       AS  GES_UPDATE_DATE ,
   NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME           AS  GLOBAL_NAME ,
   WI_NET.GL_DTM         AS  GL_DATE ,
   WI_NET.GL_POSTED_DTM       AS  GL_POSTED_DATE ,
   NULL           AS  GROUPING_ID ,
   NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT      AS   INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,
   /*NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE      AS  INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE ,*/
   NMRT.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
   NULL           AS  INVOICE_PERCENT ,
   NULL           AS  INVOICING_RULE_ID ,
   2            AS  LAST_UPDATED_BY ,
   current_timestamp(0)       AS  LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,
   WI_NET.LAST_RECORD_FLG        AS  LATEST_RECORD_FLAG ,
   WI_NET.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT               AS  SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT ,
   
   WI_NET.LINE_TYPE_CD AS LINE_TYPE , 
   NULL           AS  LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID ,
   COALESCE(NSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  ,-9999)    AS ORDER_HEADER_ID ,
   CASE WHEN NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT =0 OR NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT IS NULL THEN -9999 ELSE NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT END  AS ORDER_LINE_ID ,
   WI_NET.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT           AS  ORDER_NUMBER ,
   EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT     AS  ORG_ID ,
   NULL     AS  LINE_PERCENT ,
   NULL     AS  PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID ,
   NULL     AS  PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ,
   /* RCHETTRI : REBOK CHANGES: QUOTA FLAG FOR CG TO COME FROM  N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV */
   CASE WHEN NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME ='CG' THEN NSCTT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG ELSE ESCT.QUOTA_FLAG END  AS  QUOTA_FLAG ,
   NULL     AS  REASON_CODE ,
   NULL     AS  REBATE_AMOUNT ,
   NULL     AS  REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID ,
   CASE WHEN NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN -999 
    ELSE 999
   END            AS  REQUEST_ID ,
   WI_NET.RULE_START_DTM         AS  RULE_START_DATE ,
    CASE WHEN WI_NET.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD ='FORWARD' THEN COALESCE(WRSNT.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT       ,-999)
                   ELSE COALESCE(ESR_REVERSE.SALES_REP_ID,-999)
   END as    SALESREP_ID,
   CASE  WHEN WI_NET.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD ='FORWARD' THEN COALESCE(WRSNT.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT ,-999)
                   ELSE COALESCE(ESCT_REVERSE.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID , -999) 
   END as    SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,
   
   NULL           AS  SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID ,
   -999           AS  SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID ,
   -999           AS  SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID ,
   WI_NET.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD               AS  SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD ,
   WI_NET.SPLIT_PCT                        AS  SPLIT_PERCENT ,
    CASE  WHEN WI_NET.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD ='FORWARD' THEN COALESCE(WRSNT.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT,-999) 
                   ELSE COALESCE(EST_REVERSE.TERRITORY_ID, -999) 
   END as TERRITORY_ID,
   
   WRSNT.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM      AS  TRANSACTION_DATE ,
   WI_NET.NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD     AS  TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE ,
   NULL           AS  TRANSACTION_QUANTITY ,
   ROW_NUMBER()  OVER( ORDER BY WRSNT.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM )  + SM_MAX.MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID ,
   NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME     AS  TRX_DATE ,
   NULL        AS  TRX_NAME ,
   NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER    AS  TRX_NUMBER ,
   NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE   AS  TRX_TYPE ,
   NULL        AS  UNIT_SELLING_PRICE ,
   NULL        AS  UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE ,
   current_timestamp(0)    AS  CREATE_DATETIME ,
   'I'         AS  ACTION_CODE ,
   WI_NET.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY           AS  DV_TRANSACTION_KEY ,
   --NXOA.SK_TRX_ID_INT  AS EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,               
   WI_NET.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD     AS  DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD   ,
   COALESCE(WI_NET.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD   ,'Direct Sales') AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD  , 
   COALESCE(WI_NET.SALES_REP_NUM ,'99998')     AS  SALES_REP_NUM       ,
   COALESCE(WI_NET.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY    ,73106   )    AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  ,
 
   WI_NET.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
    FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NET_CHANGE_FOR_REV WI_NET
   
   INNER JOIN 
    ( SELECT MAX(MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID) AS MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID FROM 
      ( SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SMDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ),0) MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SMDNRTFR
     UNION ALL
     SELECT COALESCE(MAX(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ),0) MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID  FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NET_CHANGE_FOR_REV WI_DRVD
     UNION ALL
     SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG
     UNION ALL
     SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID ),0)    AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_P
     UNION ALL
     SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID ),0)    AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_P
     UNION ALL
     SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RA_P
     UNION ALL
     SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RT_P
     UNION ALL
     SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RAE_P 
   UNION ALL
     SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RV_P
     /* CSPP VIP Changes */
  UNION ALL
     SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_CSPP_VIP_P
 
     /* CG : BKG and REV exceptions */
     UNION ALL
     SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_CG
     UNION ALL
     SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_CG
     UNION ALL
     SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RT_CG
     UNION ALL
     SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_CG  
     UNION ALL 
     SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_CG  
     /* BBALIVAD added as part of SAAS implementation */
     UNION ALL
     SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_OA_S  /*bookings*/
     UNION ALL
     SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_OA_S /*bookings*/
     UNION ALL
     SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_OA_S   /*revenue*/
  /* CSPP VIP Changes */    
     UNION ALL 
     SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_CSPP_VIP_CG
  
   
 
      /* BBALIVAD added as part of OM implementation */
     UNION ALL
     SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_OM  /*bookings*/
     UNION ALL
     SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_OM /*bookings*/
     UNION ALL
     SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_RT_OA_OM   /*revenue*/
     UNION ALL
     SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_OA_OM
   UNION ALL
   SELECT COALESCE(MAX(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NET_CHANGE_FOR_REV_XAAS WI_DRVD_XAAS /*XAAS SC TABLE*/
 UNION ALL
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_OA_S
     UNION ALL
     SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_TRX_OA_OM
     UNION ALL
     SELECT MAX(BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NET_CHG_REV_ACRL_XAAS 
     UNION ALL
     SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_ACRL_TRX_CG
     UNION ALL
     SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_ACRL_TRX_CG
  UNION ALL
     SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID   ) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_ACRL_TRX_CG 
     UNION ALL
     SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_OA_S /*XAAS NET CHANGES*/
 UNION ALL
  SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_OA_S
  UNION ALL
  SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_ACRL_TRX_CG
  UNION ALL
  SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_MERK_TRX_CG
  UNION ALL SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_SWSS_CG /*SWSS CHANGES*/
UNION ALL SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_SWSS_CG /*SWSS CHANGES*/
/* As part of Net Accounting*/
 UNION ALL
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_NA_P
 UNION ALL
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID),0) AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT    FROM   $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_NA_CG
      ) TMP
    ) SM_MAX
   ON 1=1
   
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
    ON WI_NET.BK_SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX NMRT  
    ON WI_NET.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY = NMRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY

   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SORA
    ON WI_NET.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME =  SORA.NAME
    AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORA.GLOBAL_NAME
   
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB. N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
    ON WI_NET.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
   
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY   = WI_NET.AR_TRX_KEY 
    
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
    ON WI_NET.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
   
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
    ON NP.ITEM_KEY = WI_NET.PRODUCT_KEY   
   
   INNER join $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
    ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY    = WI_NET.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
   
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
    ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    = WI_NET.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
    ON NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
    AND NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
   
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_TV WRSNT
    ON WRSNT.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT      = WI_NET.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT  
    AND WRSNT.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT = WI_NET.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
    AND WRSNT.  SS_CD     =     WI_NET.BK_SS_CD
    AND WRSNT.EVENT_TYPE   IN ('UPDATE','INSERT','DELETE')
   /* RCHETTRI : REBOK CHANGES: CHANGED INNER JOIN TO LEFT JOIN */
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT
    ON ESCT.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID = WRSNT.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT
    AND ESCT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME  
   
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT 
    ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
    AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
   
   /*   Added below  joins  as part of CR  */
   LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                   (  select SALES_REP_ID,GLOBAL_NAME, SALES_REP_NUMBER 
                      from  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP
                      qualify row_number() over(partition by GLOBAL_NAME, SALES_REP_NUMBER order by SALES_REP_ID desc) = 1
                   ) ESR_REVERSE
                   ON ESR_REVERSE.GLOBAL_NAME= NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
                   AND ESR_REVERSE.SALES_REP_NUMBER = WI_NET.SALES_REP_NUM
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST_REVERSE
                   ON EST_REVERSE.GLOBAL_NAME= NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
                   AND EST_REVERSE.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = WI_NET.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
                   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT_REVERSE
                   ON ESCT_REVERSE.NAME = WI_NET.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD
                   AND ESCT_REVERSE.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
   /* RCHETTRI : REBOK CHANGES: QUOTA FLAG FOR CG DATA */    
   LEFT OUTER JOIN 
   ( SELECT BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE, SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG 
    FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV  
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE   ORDER BY END_TV_DATE DESC)=1
   ) NSCTT
    ON WI_NET.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD = NSCTT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE 
    
   WHERE WI_NET.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('REV','INV')
   AND WI_NET.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY>0

SELECT 
  NCR.BATCH_ID                      ,
  NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID            ,
  NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          ,
  NCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS                 ,
  NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE                  ,
  NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT                  ,
  NCR.ADJUSTMENT_ID                 ,
  NCR.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER             ,
  NCR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE               ,
  NCR.AMOUNT                        ,
  NCR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           ,
  NCR.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID           ,
  NCR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID           ,
  NCR.COGS_PERCENT                  ,
  NCR.COMMENTS                      ,
  NCR.CONTEXT                       ,
  NCR.CREATED_BY                    ,
  NCR.CREATION_DATE                 ,
  NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID               ,
  NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID          ,
  NCR.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID      ,
  NCR.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG               ,
  NCR.EXTENDED_AMOUNT               ,
  NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE                  ,
  NCR.FISCAL_ID                     ,
  NCR.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG          ,
  NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE            ,
  NCR.GES_UPDATE_DATE               ,
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME                   ,
  NCR.GL_DATE                       ,
  NCR.GL_POSTED_DATE                ,
  NCR.GROUPING_ID                   ,
  NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             ,
  NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE         ,
  NCR.INVOICE_PERCENT               ,
  NCR.INVOICING_RULE_ID             ,
  NCR.LAST_UPDATED_BY               ,
  NCR.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              ,
  NCR.LATEST_RECORD_FLAG            ,
  NCR.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            ,
  NCR.LINE_TYPE                     ,
  NCR.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID      ,
  NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID               ,
  NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID                 ,
  NCR.ORDER_NUMBER                  ,
  NCR.ORG_ID                        ,
  NCR.LINE_PERCENT                  ,
  NCR.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID      ,
  NCR.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ,
  NCR.QUOTA_FLAG                    ,
  NCR.REASON_CODE                   ,
  NCR.REBATE_AMOUNT                 ,
  NCR.REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID          ,
  NCR.REQUEST_ID                    ,
  NCR.RULE_START_DATE               ,
  NCR.SALESREP_ID                   ,
  NCR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID          ,
  NCR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           ,
  NCR.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID           ,
  NCR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           ,
  NCR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD            ,
  NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT                 ,
  NCR.TERRITORY_ID                  ,
  NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE              ,
  NCR.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE     ,
  NCR.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY          ,
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID       ,
  NCR.TRX_DATE                      ,
  NCR.TRX_NAME                      ,
  NCR.TRX_NUMBER                    ,
  NCR.TRX_TYPE                      ,
  NCR.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE            ,
  NCR.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE           ,
  NCR.CREATE_DATETIME               ,
  NCR.ACTION_CODE                   ,
  NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY            ,
  NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      ,
  COALESCE(NCR.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE , 'Direct Sales' ),
  COALESCE(NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER  ,'99998')  ,
  COALESCE(NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,73106),
  NCR.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
   FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_MERK_TRX_CG NCR

SELECT
 EX.BATCH_ID,
 EX.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
 EX.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
 EX.ACCOUNT_CLASS,
 EX.ACCOUNT_CODE,
 EX.ACCTD_AMOUNT,
 EX.ADJUSTMENT_ID,
 EX.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
 EX.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
 EX.AMOUNT,
 EX.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
 EX.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
 EX.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
 EX.COGS_PERCENT,
 EX.COMMENTS,
 EX.CONTEXT,
 EX.CREATED_BY,
 EX.CREATION_DATE,
 EX.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
 EX.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
 EX.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
 EX.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
 EX.EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
 EX.EXTRACT_TYPE,
 EX.FISCAL_ID,
 EX.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
 EX.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
 EX.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
 EX.GLOBAL_NAME,
 EX.GL_DATE,
 EX.GL_POSTED_DATE,
 EX.GROUPING_ID,
 EX.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
 EX.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
 EX.INVOICE_PERCENT,
 EX.INVOICING_RULE_ID,
 EX.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 EX.LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
 EX.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
 EX.LINE_TYPE,
 EX.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
 EX.ORDER_HEADER_ID,
 EX.ORDER_LINE_ID,
 EX.ORDER_NUMBER,
 EX.ORG_ID,
 EX.LINE_PERCENT,
 EX.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
 EX.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
 EX.QUOTA_FLAG,
 EX.REASON_CODE,
 EX.REBATE_AMOUNT,
 EX.REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
 EX.REQUEST_ID,
 EX.RULE_START_DATE,
 EX.SALESREP_ID,
 EX.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,
 EX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
 EX.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
 EX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
 EX.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
 EX.SPLIT_PERCENT,
 EX.TERRITORY_ID,
 EX.TRANSACTION_DATE,
 EX.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,
 EX.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
 EX.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
 EX.TRX_DATE,
 EX.TRX_NAME,
 EX.TRX_NUMBER,
 EX.TRX_TYPE,
 EX.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
 EX.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
 EX.CREATE_DATETIME,
 EX.ACTION_CODE,
 EX.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
 EX.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
 EX.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
 EX.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 EX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 EX.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_MERK_TRX_CG EX
 WHERE 
 NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 
   FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_MERK_TRX_CG WOXRTRT 
   WHERE 
   WOXRTRT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = EX.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID 
   and WOXRTRT.GLOBAL_NAME = EX.GLOBAL_NAME 
   )
